name: Creamy Tomato Bisque with Lump Crabmeat & Basil
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces lump crabmeat, fresh or canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and cut "X" in the bottom of tomatoes. Plunge into boiling water 20 to 30 seconds or until skin begins to peel back. Plunge into ice water. Peel tomatoes; cut into halves. Seed and coarsely chop tomatoes. Set aside.
2. Heat olive oil in a large heavy saucepan. Add onions and garlic. Cook 5 minutes or until transparent.
3. Add flour, whisking over low heat for 3 to 5 minutes. Do not brown.
4. Whisk in chicken broth, removing all lumps. Stir in half cup fresh basil. Heat mixture to a boil. Reduce heat to simmer and cook 5 to 10 minutes.
5. Whisk in tomato sauce, tomato juice, and reserved chopped tomatoes. Simmer 10 minutes.
6. Skim froth from the top as it forms with a large spoon. Whisk in cream; heat to a simmer.
7. Skim again if necessary. Add sugar and season with salt and white pepper.
8. Ladle into warm cups or bowls and garnish with remaining basil and fresh crabmeat, if desired.
[makes 8 cups; 8 servings]
